title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 14 February 2025
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 14 February 2025
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 14 February 2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 15/02/2025
The global ship recycling market remains weak and sluggish, with low demand and limited transactions across key destinations
Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2025-02-15_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-08-February-14-February-2025_compressed.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2025-02-15_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-08-February-14-February-2025_compressed.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
08 February - 14 February 2025
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
The global ship recycling market remains weak and sluggish, with low demand and limited transactions across key destinations. India continues to struggle
as market activity slows, further impacted by uncertainty surrounding upcoming tariffs on steel, aluminum, and other metals, which has made buyers more
cautious and hesitant to commit. Bangladesh sees minimal interest, with buyers negotiating at lower levels, while ongoing political uncertainty further
dampens sentiment.
